address: 5370 Campbellton Fairburn Rd (SR-92), Ste 430, Fairburn, GA 30213
category: Wellness clinic & urgent/primary care with med-spa arm
tagline: Veteran-owned Fairburn care under one roof — walk-in urgent and primary care meets a true wellness spa.
brand_angle: Veteran-owned Fairburn care under one roof — walk-in urgent + primary care meets a true wellness spa, with a calm clinical-luxe brand the GoDaddy site never delivered.

services.title: Urgent & Primary Care
services.desc: Walk-in care for non-life-threatening conditions plus ongoing primary care — office visits, X-ray, flu shots, sports/school/camp physicals, laceration repair and lab work, accepting most major insurance including Medicare and Medicaid.

services.title: Wellness Spa & Aesthetics
services.desc: On-site spa arm offering facials, therapeutic massage, body waxing, Botox and the Cocoon fitness pod — clinical wellness and aesthetics delivered alongside the medical practice.

services.title: Medical Weight Loss & Wellness
services.desc: Physician-guided weight-loss programs, private yoga, and mental-health and art-therapy counseling — a whole-person wellness track that sets the clinic apart from a standard urgent care.

review_note: Aggregate rating 4.9 from 1,749 reviews verified from the Solv listing on 2026-05-31; veteran-owned status verified from undeniablehealthcare.com/veterans and public listings. No individual review quotes were verified, so none are reproduced (Cmd: never invent reviews).
